// Mod Menu Code Generated by Manus AI
// Style: Custom Hook Style from hook.txt
// Game: Based on dump.cs analysis
// Update: 2026-05-05

#include <stdint.h>

// --- Structs & Types ---
struct Vector3 {
    float x, y, z;
    static Vector3 Zero() { return {0, 0, 0}; }
};

struct Quaternion {
    float x, y, z, w;
};

struct monoString {
    void* klass;
    void* monitor;
    int length;
    char chars[1];
};

// External Helper (Provided by your base)
extern uintptr_t EspGetAbsoluteAddress(uintptr_t offset);

// --- Hook Definitions (Offsets from dump.cs) ---

// 1. Player Speed
static void SetSpecialRunSpeedScale(void *player, int type, float scale) {
    void (*_SetSpecialRunSpeedScale)(void *players, int t, float s) = (void (*)(void *, int, float))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0xBF3A38);
    if (player) _SetSpecialRunSpeedScale(player, type, scale);
}

// 2. Jump Height
static void SetJumpHeightRate(void *player, float rate) {
    void (*_SetJumpHeightRate)(void *players, float r) = (void (*)(void *, float))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x8A3D6C); // Adjusted offset for Jump Rate
    if (player) _SetJumpHeightRate(player, rate);
}

// 3. Health / God Mode
static void set_Health(void *player, uint32_t health) {
    void (*_set_Health)(void *players, uint32_t val) = (void (*)(void *, uint32_t))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x58F59C);
    if (player) _set_Health(player, health);
}

// 4. Vehicle Speed
static void SetMaxSpeedScale(void *vehicle, float scale) {
    void (*_SetMaxSpeedScale)(void *veh, float s) = (void (*)(void *, float))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x8A3CC4);
    if (vehicle) _SetMaxSpeedScale(vehicle, scale);
}

// 5. Get Local Player
static void *Current_Local_Player() {
    void *(*_Local_Player)(void *players) = (void *(*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0xB325FC);
    return _Local_Player(NULL);
}

// 6. Get Current Vehicle
static void *GetPlayerCar(void *player) {
    void *(*_GetPlayerCar)(void *p) = (void *(*)(void *))EspGetAbsoluteAddress(0x8A3740);
    return _GetPlayerCar(player);
}

// --- Mod Menu Logic Functions ---

// Global Toggles
bool bSpeed = false;
bool bJump = false;
bool bGodMode = false;
bool bVehicleSpeed = false;

float speedValue = 5.0f;
float jumpValue = 3.0f;
float vSpeedValue = 10.0f;

void Speed(void* player) {
    if (bSpeed) {
        SetSpecialRunSpeedScale(player, 1, speedValue);
    } else {
        SetSpecialRunSpeedScale(player, 1, 1.0f); // Reset to normal
    }
}

void Jump(void* player) {
    if (bJump) {
        SetJumpHeightRate(player, jumpValue);
    } else {
        SetJumpHeightRate(player, 1.0f); // Reset to normal
    }
}

void GodMode(void* player) {
    if (bGodMode) {
        set_Health(player, 9999);
    }
}

void VehicleSpeed(void* player) {
    void* car = GetPlayerCar(player);
    if (car && bVehicleSpeed) {
        SetMaxSpeedScale(car, vSpeedValue);
    }
}

// --- MAIN UPDATE LOOP ---
// Use this function inside your game's main loop or hook it to a frame update

void Update(void* player) {
    if (player == NULL) return;

    // Run Mod Functions
    Speed(player);
    Jump(player);
    GodMode(player);
    VehicleSpeed(player);
}

// Example of how to call it if you have a hook on the local player update:
/*
void (*old_PlayerUpdate)(void* instance);
void PlayerUpdate(void* instance) {
    if (instance != NULL) {
        Update(instance);
    }
    old_PlayerUpdate(instance);
}
*/
